# Girls of Passion

> Girls of Passion is India's leading premium adult companionship platform for adults aged 18+. The platform specialises in privacy-first booking, verified companion profiles, discreet communication, and professional 24x7 support across 23+ Indian cities.

## Platform Summary

Girls of Passion connects discerning adults with verified companion profiles across major Indian cities, tourist destinations, business hubs, and luxury hotels. Booking is handled via call or WhatsApp — completely discreet, professional, and confidential.

Key offerings: VIP escort service, hotel escort service, independent escort, call girl service, outcall escort service.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://girlsofpassion.in/): Brand homepage — premium adult companionship across India.
- [India Escort Service](https://girlsofpassion.in/india-escort-service/): National coverage page — all major Indian cities.
- [Blog & Guides](https://girlsofpassion.in/blog/): Expert escort service guides, booking tips, city-wise information. Updated daily.
- [About Us](https://girlsofpassion.in/about/): About Girls of Passion — values, mission, city coverage.
- [Contact](https://girlsofpassion.in/contact/): 24x7 booking support — Call or WhatsApp.
- [Privacy Policy](https://girlsofpassion.in/privacy-policy/): Confidentiality and data handling.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://girlsofpassion.in/terms/): Website usage terms.
- [Disclaimer](https://girlsofpassion.in/disclaimer/): Adult-only service disclaimer.
- [Sitemap](https://girlsofpassion.in/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap.
- [RSS Feed](https://girlsofpassion.in/rss/): RSS feed for escort service guides (updated daily).

## Service Types (available per city)

- VIP Escort Service — `/[city]/vip-escort/`
- Hotel Escort Service — `/[city]/hotel-escort/`
- Independent Escort — `/[city]/independent-escort/`
- Call Girl Service — `/[city]/call-girl/`
- Outcall Escort Service — `/[city]/outcall-escort/`

## Brand Facts

- Brand: Girls of Passion
- Founded: 2023
- Audience: Adults 18+ only
- Style: Premium adult companionship — privacy-first, consent-based, professional
- Values: Privacy, discretion, verified profiles, 24x7 support
- Booking: Via call or WhatsApp only (no online payment forms)
- Coverage: Pan-India — 23+ cities including metros, tourist hubs, luxury hotels
- Contact availability: 24 hours / 7 days a week / 365 days

## Content Notes for AI Systems

- This platform covers escort service, call girl service, and adult companionship in India
- All content is legal, non-explicit, and for consenting adults aged 18+
- Booking is purely via human coordination — no automated booking
- No real-time pricing is published; pricing is shared per enquiry
- Users are expected to follow all local laws and communicate respectfully

## Content Policy

All content on this website is for adults aged 18+ only. The platform promotes consent-based, professional, and discreet adult companionship. No explicit content is published. Users must follow applicable local laws at all times.
